summary: Tested THE BHARAT admin panel new features end-to-end (slot-based ads, Manage tab, list endpoints). Backend: 18/18 pytest cases PASS including new GET /api/admin/news/list and /api/admin/ads/list (_id stripped, content stripped from news list, media stripped from ads list, sorted correctly). Frontend (Expo web @ 375x667): admin login (sunil@123) → Manage tab loads with News (74) and Ads (1) counts. ADMIN badges render on admin-uploaded news, SLOT N badges render on ads. Red trash delete on news works on web (window.confirm auto-accepted) — item removed from list (74→73) with green 'News deleted!' banner. Home feed shows EXCLUSIVE badges on admin news at top and 'ADVERTISEMENT · Slot 1' card appearing in the slot-based position.

minor.issue: Generic try/except wraps HTTPException(404) and returns 500 instead of 404 for non-existent IDs. Should re-raise HTTPException before catching Exception.
Same pattern — 404 path is unreachable due to broad except Exception.
No authentication on admin write endpoints (login is client-side only). Pre-existing from iteration_1.
Returns all 500 docs unconditionally, no pagination. Will get slow as news grows.

issues: ADMIN badge color (#DC143C) and SLOT badge color (#1F2937) render well, but ADMIN badge is small (9px font) — readable on web but borderline on small mobile screens

react_native_issues.issue: Pre-existing 'shadow* deprecated', 'SafeAreaView deprecated', 'pointerEvents deprecated', 'Image resizeMode deprecated' warnings still flooding console. Non-blocking.

action_items: Fix DELETE endpoints to properly return 404: wrap HTTPException re-raise outside the broad except (e.g., `except HTTPException: raise` before `except Exception`).
(Optional) Add pagination/limit to /api/admin/news/list as the news collection grows.
(Optional, pre-existing) Add auth token to /api/admin/* endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py delete handlers swallow HTTPException(404) via broad `except Exception` — returns 500 with HTTPException as detail instead of 404.
Admin write endpoints accept any unauthenticated request (login state is only client-side).
/api/admin/news/list pulls up to 500 docs synchronously into memory each call — fine for now but plan for pagination.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_admin_apis.py (expanded to 18 tests covering new list + delete endpoints)
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed news+ads and clean up via DELETE in teardown. UI test created 'UI_TEST_MANAGE_NEWS' which was then deleted via the red trash button to verify delete flow. Pre-existing 'Welcome to THE BHARAT - Slot Demo' admin news and 'Sample Ad - Slot 1' remain (from main agent's seed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin features incl. list endpoints, slot-based ad placement (verified via mergeNewsWithAds logic), and Manage tab delete flows work. /app/backend/tests/test_admin_apis.py runs all 18 tests via `pytest backend/tests/test_admin_apis.py -v`. Only minor server.py bug: delete endpoints return 500 instead of 404 due to broad except Exception swallowing HTTPException.
rca_of_issue: N/A — all requested features (1-10) work as designed. The new list endpoints correctly strip _id, content (news), and media (ads), and the Manage tab UI renders badges and delete buttons correctly. Delete flow uses Promise-based window.confirm on web (auto-accepted by Playwright dialog handler) and removes item from local state immediately.
